subcodes.first_line: O thou who yearnest for the Luminary of the horizons! Grieve not, weep not, wail not, neither raise thy voice in lamentation, nor seek to mourn, God willing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتاق نیر آفاق غم مخور کریه مکن مویه منما ناله مفرما نوحه مجو انشاء الله
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @soul; spirit after death, @nearness and remoteness
